title: Jammu、Jammu and Kashmir — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Jammu、Jammu and Kashmir的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Jammu是Jammu and Kashmir的一個城市，人口約700,000。The winter capital of Jammu and Kashmir, known for its ancient temples, Vaishno Devi shrine, and as a gateway to the Kashmir Valley.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
